name: Scene Weave
summary: Transform briefs into prose with choices
purpose: Transform Section Briefs into full prose Sections with dialogue, sensory detail, and contrastive choices. Voice first, structure assumed stable.
description: Scene Weave is the prose loop. Scene Smith fills structural shells from Story Spark with dialogue and sensory detail. The structure is assumed stable—this loop does not change topology, only inhabits it. The focus is on voice, aesthetic quality, contrastive choices, and diegetic gate phrasing. Hooks generated here are scene-level (traits, tells, props) rather than structural.

triggers.condition: Section Briefs are ready from Story Spark
Style Lead requests prose revision for voice consistency
Gatekeeper flags style or presentation issues in existing sections

required_artifacts.description: Section Briefs from Story Spark defining structure and intent

optional_artifacts.description: Unified style guide for prose and visual consistency

context_requirements: Style Guide from workspace (voice, register, visual language)
Codex entries relevant to the section (player-safe references)
Canon summaries if needed for accurate portrayal (request from Lore Weaver)

required_artifacts.description: Full prose Sections with choices and gates

optional_artifacts.description: Scene-level hooks (traits, tells, props, style questions)

prose_drafting.name: Prose Drafting
prose_drafting.purpose: Transform each Section Brief into draft prose with dialogue, choices, and sensory detail

draft_prose.action: Draft section prose following the brief's intent, stakes, and choice intents. Make choices clear and contrastive. Express gates diegetically.
draft_prose.guidance: Honor the Plotwright brief—do not invent new topology. Two clear options beat five near-synonyms. Gates must read as world facts (badge, knowledge, reputation, tool), never as mechanics. Never print codeword names, flag IDs, or schema references in prose.

outputs.name: draft_sections
outputs.description: Draft sections ready for style review

generate_scene_hooks.action: Create hook cards for scene-level questions: character traits, environmental tells, props that could matter, style uncertainties.
generate_scene_hooks.guidance: Scene hooks capture aesthetic possibilities, not structural changes. If you discover a structural problem, escalate to Plotwright via hook rather than fixing it in prose.

completion_criteria: Every Section Brief has a corresponding draft Section
Choices are contrastive (differ in intent and outcome)
No internal mechanics visible in prose

style_review.name: Style Review
style_review.purpose: Verify voice consistency and flag any drift from established register

check_voice.action: Review draft sections for voice, register, visual language alignment, and motif consistency. Flag drift and propose corrections.
check_voice.guidance: Style Lead reviews prose for voice consistency and visual language alignment. Cross-check against Style Guide. Flag drift but offer smallest viable fix.

apply_corrections.action: Apply style corrections to draft sections based on feedback.

completion_criteria: Sections are in-voice per style guardrails

on_failure.message: Style review found drift. Return to Prose Drafting with style feedback.

self_validation.name: Self Validation
self_validation.purpose: Scene Smith self-checks before requesting formal gatecheck

validate_sections.action: Self-validate sections against schema and quality criteria. Use validate_artifact tool.
validate_sections.guidance: Check: anchor resolution (all choices lead somewhere), spoiler hygiene (no canon leakage), choice integrity (contrastive options), diegetic gates (no mechanics). Fix any issues before requesting gatecheck.

on_failure.message: Self-validation failed. Return to Prose Drafting with validation feedback.

gatecheck_request.name: Gatecheck Request
gatecheck_request.purpose: Request formal Gatekeeper review of completed sections

submit_for_review.action: Submit sections to Gatekeeper for formal gatecheck against all 8 quality bars.
submit_for_review.guidance: Gatekeeper enforces: Integrity, Reachability, Nonlinearity, Gateways, Style, Determinism, Presentation, Accessibility. Block with reason and offer smallest viable fix.

on_success.message: Sections approved. Ready for Cold merge after full pipeline (Lore, Codex, etc.).

on_failure.message: Gatecheck blocked. Return to Prose Drafting with Gatekeeper feedback.
